title: When Sub-Item Status changes to Something, Then send an Email to Someone
excerpt: Have the ability for automations to apply to both the Item and Sub-Item without having to create duplicate automations. Also allow Sub-Items to email someone when an automation event occurs (not currently supported).

posts.author: topa3d (Paul Tice)
posts.cookedHtml: Have the ability for automations to apply to both the Item and Sub-Item without having to create duplicate automations. Also allow Sub-Items to email someone when an automation event occurs (not currently supported).
